name: Moist Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash bananas by hand or with a mixer until fairly smooth, but still slightly lumpy.
2. Gradually add all other ingredients in order, mixing as you go.
3. Add melted butter last and stir to combine.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured loaf pan (or 2 small loaf pans).
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes.
Note: For best results, grease the pan with Butter-flavored Crisco or use butter.
